name: VISTA GOLD CORP
summary: Vista Gold Corp. is a development-stage gold mining company whose primary asset is the Mt Todd Gold Project in Northern Territory, Australia. The company does not generate cash flows from mining operations. Mt Todd is a large gold deposit with a 30-year mine life, targeting 15,000 tonnes per day processing capacity, with an after-tax NPV of $1.1 billion at $2,500/oz gold.

products.name: Mt Todd Gold Project
products.description: Development-stage open-pit gold mining project in Northern Territory, Australia, targeting 15,000 tpd processing with a 30-year mine life and average annual production of 146,000 ounces.

partnerships.description: Collaboration with local indigenous group on environmentally sound and socially responsible development plan for Mt Todd.
Engagement with NT Government on permitting, reclamation obligations, and regulatory compliance for the Mt Todd project.
